prompt:
Create a vertical high-fashion Japanese magazine cover featuring a cute plush mascot model dressed in edgy dark luxury streetwear. The cover title is MODE CHAOS, printed extremely large across the top in elegant dark green serif letters, partially hidden behind the character. Canvas: portrait magazine cover, about 2:3 aspect ratio, warm beige studio background, glossy editorial lighting, premium fashion photography aesthetic with a slightly surreal toy-model subject. Main subject: a round beige plush character with simple black oval eyes, a small smiling mouth, soft blush cheeks, and thick wavy black human-like hair; the character has a clown-like or fantasy hood silhouette with black side panels, gold trim, a gold horn-like crest on top, and a black speech-bubble-shaped ear ornament with three gold dots. The mascot poses confidently seated, one black-gloved hand raised near its temple and the other hand in a pocket. Outfit: oversized black leather blazer, black turtleneck, black leather pants, gold piping, black gloves, multiple gold rings and fasteners, layered gold necklaces including a circular pendant and a white cursor-arrow charm, black belt with gold hardware, small black pouch hanging at the waist, dark glossy stool or chair visible at the lower left. Color palette: deep black, forest green, antique gold, ivory beige, with strong highlights on leather and metal.

Layout and text: create a dense Japanese fashion magazine cover with many editorial blurbs arranged around the model. Include exactly 10 visible cover text groups: 1) top-left small Japanese tagline "自分らしく、着こなせ。"; 2) top-center bracket label "[ MODE CHAOS ]"; 3) upper-right issue block "MAY 2024", large "05", "特別定価 980YEN"; 4) left under masthead small English text "STYLE & IDEAS FOR NEXT GENERATION MEN"; 5) large left Japanese headline "服で語る、新しい自分。" with smaller line "ファッションは最強の自己表現だ。"; 6) left feature block with small label "FEATURE" and Japanese copy about green and gold style strategy; 7) right Japanese blurb about shirts and layers; 8) right-middle Japanese blurb about bags and spring essentials; 9) circular off-white badge reading "BOOK in BOOK" with Japanese guide copy; 10) bottom cover story with "2024 S/S", huge Japanese headline 今、いちばんクールな服。, smaller Japanese subtitle, handwritten gold script The Vibe Starts With You., plus bottom-left "NEXT BREAKER" copy and bottom-right "BEAUTY NOTE" copy. Use realistic print typography mixing bold Japanese Mincho-style type, elegant serif English, and gold cursive script. Keep the subject centered and overlapping the masthead, with professional magazine-cover composition, no barcode, no watermark, no extra characters.
